description: A 3D artist has completed a car visualization render but the raw output looks flat. Create a cinematic post-processing pipeline for the BMW car scene using Blender's Compositor. The setup must utilize a Glare node (Fog Glow or Streaks, threshold ≤ 1.0), a Color Balance node for warm toning, and a Lens Distortion node (distortion between -0.05 and 0.1). Save the final rendered composite to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/cinematic_composite.png and the project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/compositing_setup.blend.
